basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Madras. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: No age limit is specified in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Four-year Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science/Data Science/AI-ML, Electrical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Engineering Design, Automotive Engineering, Transportation Engineering, Mechatronics, Robotics, Energy Systems/Sustainable Energy Engineering, Physics or Chemistry, CSIR-UGC NET or GATE qualification, First class throughout from class 10th onwards
qualification.details: A four-year bachelor's degree or a master's Degree in Computer Science/Data Science/AI-ML, Electrical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Engineering Design, Automotive Engineering, Transportation Engineering, Mechatronics, Robotics, Energy Systems/Sustainable Energy Engineering, Physics or Chemistry with first-class throughout from class 10th onwards and qualified CSIR-UGC NET or GATE.

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Associate I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Madras Project Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Associate I Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Madras Project Associate I Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: A four-year bachelor's degree or a master's Degree in Computer Science/Data Science/AI-ML, Electrical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Engineering Design, Automotive Engineering, Transportation Engineering, Mechatronics, Robotics, Energy Systems/Sustainable Energy Engineering, Physics or Chemistry with first-class throughout from class 10th onwards and qualified CSIR-UGC NET or GATE.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Associate I Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: No age limit is specified in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Associate I Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Madras Project Associate I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate I position at IIT Madras is July 20, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a four-year bachelor's or master's degree in specific fields like Computer Science, Data Science, AI-ML, Engineering disciplines, Physics, or Chemistry, along with CSIR-UGC NET or GATE qualification and first-class marks from 10th grade onwards.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate I position at IIT Madras as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate I position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 48,100, which includes a basic pay and House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIT Madras Project Associate I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Associate I recruitment at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online application, followed by shortlisting of candidates. Shortlisted candidates will then undergo a test or interview, and finally, document verification will be conducted.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate I position at IIT Madras is a contractual job, meaning the employment is for a fixed tenure as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Madras located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Madras is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600036.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Tamil Nadu. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific state-related requirements.

faq.question: Q10. How can I get the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
